Hey Product Hunt!

I'm Andrew, co-founder of Trovio. Last time we were here, we launched Pitch Kit to help creators land brand deals without an agent. Today we're launching the other side of the marketplace: the Trovio Brand Dashboard. [...] Andrew Lukas

Trovio For Brands

Trovio For Brands

Maker

@priya\_kushwaha1 Short links, mostly. We don't really need promo codes to get there. The link carries the attribution, so you get click through to conversion on the brand's side without asking a creator to remember a code or a customer to type one in.  
  
The other half is that our creators are actually on Trovio with their accounts connected, so we can pull the post-side numbers straight from the platform instead of relying on screenshots or self-reported stats. So you get both ends... what the post did, and what it drove.  
  
Thanks again for checking it out!

Report

Priya K

@andrew\_lukas Got it thanks, Really like the attribution approach 👏

Report

Steven Snider [...] The other piece is the creator themselves. Every brief is opt-in, and they know their audience way better than we do. If a partnership would land wrong, they just pass. Their whole business is the trust you're describing, so they're not going to risk it on a bad fit. Doesn't make the risk zero, but it kills the two most common causes of it. Also would love to hear what you learned doing this by hand, that sounds like hard-won knowledge haha

Report

results.title: LnkFlow: Agentic click tracking that shows what grows your ...
results.content:
I partnered with several content creators, including some big names with millions of followers and smaller ones with 10k to 500k followers…   
The problem was that, except for the timing of the video's appearance, the statistics were completely unreliable.  
  
The existing solutions that I found were too broad and aimed at enterprises.  
From a general URL shortener without influencer tracking, to a big influencer agency management tool.  
I didn't find a balanced tool that will provide me with both branded links and a good influencer management platform.  
  
So I decided to solve that issue by creating a tool that will do exactly that. [...] Subscribe

Launching today

LnkFlow

# LnkFlow

Launching today

## Agentic click tracking that shows what grows your business

11 followers

## Agentic click tracking that shows what grows your business

11 followers

Visit website

Advertising tools

See which campaigns, channels, and collabs make you money! With reliable, server-side click tracking that counts the visits, ad blockers hide. Turn any URL into a short, branded link tagged by campaign, channel, or creator. Rank creators and platforms by who actually drove clicks, with bots filtered out by default. And it's fully agentic-ready: your AI assistant can create links, tag them, and pull reports in plain language — no dashboard required. Clean links in, clear answers out.
